title: Ability to search within the widgets of an item
excerpt: When using the search bar on a board, it allows you to search the columns, but it does not let you search within an item description from the main search bar.

posts.author: Tucker (Tucker Smothermon)
posts.cookedHtml: When using the search bar on a board, it allows you to search the columns, but it does not let you search within an item description from the main search bar.
